title: [Python] Wheel upload doesn't work on MacOS
body:
@rsetaluri It appears the step we are using to publish wheels to PyPI doesn't work on MacOS: https://github.com/llvm/circt/actions/runs/5293588613/jobs/9581906975#step:8:16.

I believe the recommended workflow in this case is to run all the jobs, with each of them publishing artifacts to a shared place, and a final job that runs on linux and does the upload: https://github.com/pypa/gh-action-pypi-publish/discussions/15
